notes: Critical inverted gravity bug (tryMove y:-1 moves pieces up instead of down) makes the game unplayable, though visual layout and piece colors are well-implemented.
Catastrophic coordinate system failure: pieces spawn at the bottom, fall UPWARDS, and stack invisibly at the top of the screen.

The game resembles Tetris and mostly runs, but core logic is notably flawed with inverted vertical movement/spawn orientation causing atypical gameplay, plus several mechanics are incomplete or inconsistent.
